prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as it discusses data from the Student Loans Company (SLC) specifically regarding withdrawal notifications of students funded by Student Finance England, and it includes statistics related to student finance which is managed at the national level in England.
